# assetRegistry

**Instance Property**

An object that loads and unloads audio resources.

## Declaration

```swift
var assetRegistry: PHASEAssetRegistry { get }
```

## Discussion

This property loads audio resources from disk to memory, and unloads audio resources to free up system resources.
title: assetRegistry
